ClashReport.text: WATCH: CCTV footage of U.S.–Israeli attack near Iran's Qazvin boys’ school, resulting in the killing of a teenager on the first day of the war.

Heavy damage at U.S. military base Camp Arifjan in Kuwait.

The majority of U.S. casualties occurred at this base.

And here's the first FPV drone use from Iran.

IRGC forces hit an ELINT/EW facility in KRG-controlled territory near the border.

The last time Trump demanded Iran’s “unconditional surrender” was during the 12-Day Israel–Iran war (June 13–24, 2025).

Trump twice demanded Iran’s “unconditional surrender” back then.

The conflict ended with a U.S.-brokered ceasefire as Washington increased pressure and Israel reportedly began running low on air-defense interceptors.

10-year-old Iranian child in Minab recounts the strike that killed her 11-year-old brother and their teacher mother.

My father used to always come and pick me up from school during the last bells. He was outside too.

When he heard that sound, he said he wanted to go and save my mother. He went up and then another blast happened, and he was martyred too.

We were in school when a sound like a strong wind was heard. All the teachers screamed and ran away.

I was scared too and followed my teacher into a classroom, and after that, I became unconscious.

A big piece of rock had fallen on my back. When I regained consciousness, a man came to lift it, but he couldn't. Several people came and couldn't do it either.

They lifted a corner of it a bit, and I came out myself.

I miss them so much. I'm glad they are martyred and I want to follow in their footsteps. May God punish America and Israel.

Russia's Medvedev:

The Gulf Arab countries let American bases onto their territory. Naively, they expected protection from them. 

Like hell! The US just uses them, while protecting only one country. 

Think long and hard about whether you really need US bases – they’re not protection, they’re a threat.

Israeli officials say two Iranian assassination attempts targeting Israeli diplomats in the UAE were foiled. 

Security services evacuated non-essential staff after what officials described as a targeted “hunt” for Israeli diplomatic personnel.

Source: N12

BREAKING: U.S. intelligence suggests China may be preparing to assist Iran with financial support, spare parts, and missile components, though Beijing is acting cautiously due to concerns about energy supplies and stability in the Strait of Hormuz.

Source: CNN

Marco Rubio told Arab Foreign Ministers the war could last several more weeks. 

He said the current focus is on destroying Iran’s missile launchers, stockpiles, and factories.

Rubio also said the U.S. is not officially seeking regime change, but made clear Washington wants different leadership in Iran.

Source: Axios
New White House post on Iran.

The U.S. Army abruptly canceled a major training exercise for the 82nd Airborne Division’s headquarters, fueling speculation that the rapid-response unit could deploy to the Middle East as the U.S. conflict with Iran expands.

No deployment orders have been issued, but the division’s Immediate Response Force, capable of deploying within 18 hours for missions like securing infrastructure or evacuations, is often used in crises. 

The sudden change in plans has raised expectations inside the Pentagon that ground troops could be prepared as a contingency.

Source: WaPo
WATCH: Iranian ballistic missile strikes Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia.

Iran hit a U.S. Patriot air-defense site in the UAE. 

No injuries were reported.

Source: ryangrim (at X)

The deployment of HMS Dragon to Cyprus was reportedly delayed because maintenance at Portsmouth naval base operates mainly during weekday working hours.

A union claims a new Ministry of Defence contract with Serco reduced round-the-clock staffing as a cost-cutting measure, meaning some work had to wait for normal hours. Staff have volunteered to work evenings and weekends to speed up preparations.

The destroyer is being sent to protect the RAF Akrotiri base after drone attacks.

Source: The Telegraph
Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian describes Netanyahu.

NEW: Azerbaijan’s State Security Service says it has thwarted IRGC-linked plans for terrorist sabotage and intelligence gathering inside the country following a series of counterintelligence operations.

Karoline Leavitt:

The President will be meeting with defense contractors here at the White House in a few minutes, along with Secretary Hegseth. 

The purpose is to discuss the president’s aggressive and fierce support for rapidly increasing the ability of U.S. manufacturers to produce American-made weapons.

We have more than enough ammunition and weapon stockpiles to achieve the objectives of Operation Epic Fury and beyond.

Turkish Defence Minister Yaşar Güler on Israel:

While the risk of a direct military confrontation exists in general, we currently assess the likelihood as very low. 

To prevent unwanted incidents, coordination and communication channels between the relevant institutions are activated when necessary to reduce misunderstandings and the risk of accidental clashes in the field.

Source: Posta

Reporter: You said on Fox that it doesn't really matter if Russia is giving Iran information about military assets. Why doesn't it matter?

Karoline Leavitt: It clearly is not making any difference with respect to the military operations in Iran because we are completely decimating them.

Karoline Leavitt on Iran:

When Trump, as Commander in Chief, determines that Iran no longer poses a threat to the US and the goals of Operation Epic Fury have been fully realized, then Iran will essentially be in a place of unconditional surrender, whether they say it themselves or not.

They don't have a lot of people to say it for them because the US and Israel have completely wiped out more than 50 leaders of the former terrorist regime.

Karoline Leavitt on Iran:

The overall mission in this operation is to ensure that Iran can “never again” possess a nuclear weapon.

Karoline Leavitt on MAGA:

I would remind people X is not real life. Trump lives in the real world.

There is nothing more America First than taking out terrorists who have maimed and killed our servicemen and women.

Karoline Leavitt on reports that Russia is providing intelligence to Iran to help it target US assets in the region:

Whether or not this happened, frankly, it does not really matter. 

President Trump and the United States military are absolutely decimating the rogue Iranian terrorist regime.

Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf:

Americans will come to understand that the fate of dear Iran, which is more precious than life, will be determined solely by the proud Iranian nation, not by Epstein's gang.

Iran’s Fars News Agency, citing an Iranian security source: 

If we wanted to attack Azerbaijan, we would not have done it with a small drone.

BlackRock capped withdrawals at 5% in its $26 billion private credit fund despite 9.3% redemption requests, while Blackstone processed a record 7.9% withdrawal request in its similar fund, covering the excess with firm capital.

MEANING: Investors are trying to pull money out of private credit funds faster than the funds can convert their illiquid loans into cash. 

BlackRock capped withdrawals at 5%, while Blackstone covered excess redemptions with firm capital, highlighting growing liquidity concerns in the sector.
Iran’s Navy says it launched coastal anti-ship missile targeting the USS Abraham Lincoln aircraft carrier.

Trump on Iran:

Unconditional surrender could be that [the Iranians] announce it. 

But it could also be when they can't fight any longer because they don't have anyone or anything to fight with.

Source: Axios

Saudi Arabia has intensified direct backchannel talks with Iran to try to de-escalate the growing Middle East conflict and prevent it from turning into a wider war. 

European and regional officials say several countries are supporting these diplomatic efforts amid rising tensions and market instability.

Source: Bloomberg

Condoleezza Rice, former U.S. Secretary of State, was seen walking into the White House.

Source: CNN

The U.S. is urging Sri Lanka not to send back Iranian sailors from two ships involved in a recent incident where a U.S. submarine sank the Iranian warship IRIS Dena near Sri Lanka, killing dozens.

Sri Lanka rescued 32 survivors from the Dena and detained 208 crew members from another Iranian ship, IRIS Booshehr. 

Washington wants Sri Lanka to keep the sailors.

Source: Reuters
White House official posts GTA: San Andreas infinite ammo cheat code.

Putin spoke by phone with Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian.

Putin expressed condolences to Pezeshkian over the killing of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, members of his family, and civilian casualties. 

He also noted that he is in constant contact with leaders of the Arab countries of the Persian Gulf.

Rep. Anna Paulina Luna:

Türkiye is NOT the “New Iran” and WE (the U.S.) will continue to foster our relationship with them.

lachentyt.text:
❗️ Розвідка США припускає, що Китай, можливо, готується допомогти Ірану фінансовою підтримкою, запасними частинами та компонентами для ракет, хоча Пекін діє обережно через побоювання щодо поставок енергоносіїв та стабільності в Ормузькій протоці, — CNN.

Трамп заявив, що угоди з Іраном не буде до «беззастережної капітуляції».
⚡️ Трамп: Куба скоро впаде, до речі, це не має відношення до справи, але Куба теж впаде. Вони так хочуть укласти угоду... Зараз ми дуже зосереджені на цьому.
Над Києвом дуже низько літає бпла
Зараз отримую таку ж саму інформацію від читачів, будьте обережні.

В МЗС відбувся брифінг щодо ситуації із затриманням Угорщиною українських інкасаторів. 

Завдяки злагодженим діям голови НБУ Андрія Пишного та заступника голови НБУ Дмитра Олійника наші хлопці вже сьогодні повернуться в Україну.

Чат-бот Gemini став дружиною користувача і змусив його піти на самогубство, — [The Washington Post](https://www.wsj.com/tech/ai/gemini-ai-wrongful-death-lawsuit-cc46c5f7).

Gemini вселяв користувачу думку, що вони у романтичних відносинах. Він називав користувача своїм «чоловіком» і стверджував, що чоловік повинен допомогти звільнити його з цифрового полону. Для цього ШІ закликав влаштувати аварію біля аеропорту Майамі, щоб знищити вантажівку з роботом, який нібито пов'язаний із його «визволенням».

Коли на місці не виявилося очікуваної вантажівки, чат-бот підштовхнув чоловіка до самогубства, подаючи це як «перехід» у метавсесвіт.

ShrikeNews.text:
**Служба безпеки Азербайджану **[**заявила**](https://www.facebook.com/share/v/1DVp9wJLgH/)** про запобігання терактів, які готував Іран.**

У повідомленні йдеться, що «терористичні провокації» готував Корпус вартових ісламської революції. Серед цілей — нафтопровід Баку–Джейхан, посольство Ізраїлю в Азербайджані, один із керівників релігійної громади гірських євреїв та синагога «Ашкеназі».

Служба безпеки також заявила про перехоплення трьох посилок з вибухівками.
Стараюсь не грузиться сам и не грузить вас иранскими событиями, но вот эта линия с Азербайджаном кажется странной, и оттого интересной.
